texto: They say that even of a good thing you can have too much. But I doubt it. True, such good things as sunbathing, beer, and tobacco may be intemperately pursued to the detriment of their devotees; yet, to my mind, one cannot have too much of a good murder.
explicacao: Orientação direta de William Roughead sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “They say that even of a good thing you can have too much. But I doubt it. True, such good things …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, crime, murder, útil em momentos de murder.
